fields.name: Professional DSLR Camera X100
fields.description: A high-performance DSLR camera designed for photographers and content creators. Features advanced autofocus, high-resolution image capture, and professional-grade build quality.

fields.name: Luxury Matte Lipstick Rouge Velvet
fields.description: A premium matte lipstick with rich color payoff, long-lasting wear, and a smooth velvet finish for an elegant everyday look.

fields.name: Smart Kitchen Blender Pro
fields.description: A powerful kitchen blender designed for smoothies, soups, sauces, and everyday food preparation with professional-grade performance.

fields.name: Royal Elegance 18K Gold Necklace
fields.description:
Add a touch of luxury to your jewelry collection with the Royal Elegance 18K Gold Necklace. Expertly crafted with premium-quality gold and a refined finish, this necklace offers a classic design that never goes out of style.

Key Features:
• Premium 18K gold finish
• Elegant and timeless design
• Lightweight and comfortable
• Suitable for daily wear
• Perfect gift for special occasions
• Durable craftsmanship

Whether worn alone or layered with other pieces, this necklace brings sophistication and charm to any outfit.

fields.name: Blue Jeans
fields.description:
Men's Classic Blue Jeans made from high-quality cotton denim. These jeans offer a comfortable regular fit with a modern look, making them suitable for everyday wear. The durable construction and versatile design make them an essential addition to any wardrobe.

Specifications:
• Material: 98% Cotton, 2% Elastane
• Fit: Regular Fit
• Waist: Mid Rise
• Closure: Zip Fly with Button
• Pockets: 5
• Color: Classic Blue
• Suitable for: Casual and Daily Wear

fields.name: White Shirt
fields.description:
Classic White Shirt crafted from premium cotton fabric. Designed for comfort and elegance, this versatile shirt is suitable for both formal and casual occasions.

Features:
• 100% Premium Cotton
• Regular Fit
• Long Sleeves
• Button-Down Front
• Soft and Breathable Fabric
• Easy Care and Durable
• Color: White

Perfect for office wear, business meetings, and everyday use.
Available in multiple sizes.

fields.name: Black Hoodie
fields.description:
Comfortable Black Hoodie made from a soft cotton-blend fabric. Designed for everyday wear, this hoodie provides warmth, durability, and a modern casual look.

Features:
• Soft Cotton Blend Fabric
• Regular Fit
• Adjustable Drawstring Hood
• Kangaroo Front Pocket
• Ribbed Cuffs and Hem
• Warm and Comfortable
• Color: Black

Ideal for casual outings, workouts, and daily wear.
Available in multiple sizes.

fields.name: Cargo Pants
fields.description:
Men's Cargo Pants designed for comfort, durability, and functionality. Made from high-quality cotton fabric, these pants feature multiple utility pockets and a relaxed fit, making them perfect for everyday wear and outdoor activities.

Features:
• Premium Cotton Fabric
• Relaxed Fit
• Multiple Cargo Pockets
• Durable Stitching
• Button and Zip Closure
• Breathable and Comfortable
• Color: Khaki

Suitable for casual wear, travel, hiking, and outdoor adventures.
Available in multiple sizes.

fields.name: Denim Jacket

Perfect for casual outings, travel, and everyday wear.

fields.name: Summer Shorts
fields.description:
Lightweight Men's Summer Shorts designed for maximum comfort during warm weather. Made from breathable cotton fabric, these shorts offer a relaxed fit and versatile style suitable for everyday activities.

Features:

• Relaxed Fit

Perfect for summer outings, vacations, beach trips, and casual daily wear.
Available in multiple sizes.
